caption: The video captures a scene where individuals, likely members of a sports team, are boarding a bus adorned with various sponsor logos such as Audi, Hankook, Movistar, Nivea Men, Codere, Exness, Emirates, Real Madrid, and Adidas. The bus is parked on a paved area with palm trees visible in the background, suggesting a warm or tropical location. A person wearing a backpack and holding a bottle is seen walking towards the open door of the bus, while another individual, possibly a staff member or media personnel, stands nearby holding a camera, ready to capture the moment. The atmosphere appears organized and professional, indicative of a pre-game or travel preparation scenario for a sports event.
